intentSynonyms: show me my dns records in netlify
view my dns records in netlify
see all my dns records in netlify
list dns records in a zone in netlify
description: List all DNS records in a Netlify DNS zone. Returns record hostname, type (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, etc.), value, TTL, and priority.

zone_id.description: The DNS zone ID to list records for
